params.name: Maitreya in Meditation
params.description:
On Jan 29, 600 AD, the Maitreya in Meditation Statue was crafted.
This statue was unearthed in Korea. It was a large-sized gilt-bronze statue made in the late stage of the Three Kingdoms era of Korea. It wears a three-hill-shaped headwear, thus, it's also known as the Three-hill Statue in Contemplation. The statue is the young Siddhartha who wears nothing on the upper half and hangs a ring on the neck. He wears a fancy kilt with the left foot on the pedestal and the right leg on the left one. …
